name: popup-menu
title: Popup Menu
description: Generic floating dropdown / context-menu surface: a rounded, shadowed panel that holds a list of options. Refined from the monolith's `.pop` popovers (the widget '···' more-menu, counter picker and source picker). It is the plane only — option rows are the composed menu-item atom (.oo-menu__item / .oo-menu__sep) — and adds an optional sticky search header, uppercase group labels, and a floating/anchored open-close behaviour. Base renders in flow (always-open surface); a --floating modifier plus a '···' trigger and -host wrapper drive a real anchored dropdown with outside-click / Esc dismissal.
